name: Liveblocks
pricing_model: per monthly active room — Free 500 rooms/mo, Pro $30/mo + $0.03/room overage, Team $600/mo
free_tier: 500 monthly active rooms, 10 simultaneous connections/room, unlimited MAU
channel_primitive: Room (one room = one document). Rooms are isolated by roomId at the edge.
maintenance_signal: Active — monthly changelog ('What's new in Liveblocks: February 2026'); v3.18 tagged weeks before research date.

name: Yjs
pricing_model: Free (OSS). Infra cost = your own WebSocket node(s) + optional Redis.
hosting: Self-hosted. y-websocket ships a reference server; y-redis for horizontal scale.

payload_limits_on_wire.note: Binary CRDT updates. Each op encoded as Y.Item (~few bytes). Version vector ~4KB, grows with op count, not with content size.
payload_limits_on_wire.typical_move_op_bytes: < 100 bytes for a single key-value update in a Y.Map

channel_primitive: Y.Doc instance = one document/room. Channel isolation by WS URL path + doc name. Sub-docs API allows sharing one WS for multiple scopes.
maintenance_signal: Active — Kevin Jahns + contributors; y-websocket 3.0 (breaking: new wire protocol) shipped 2024.

name: 자체 WS (ws + custom protocol)
package: ws (server) + native WebSocket (browser) — OR — socket.io + socket.io-client
pricing_model: Free (OSS). Infra cost = Node host. Vercel Functions do not support long-lived WS — need separate Node process (Fly.io / Railway / VPS).
hosting: Self-hosted. Does NOT run inside Vercel Functions (HTTP request/response only).

payload_limits_on_wire.note: You define the wire format. JSON card-move event ≈ 120-180 bytes gz uncompressed-friendly; binary (msgpack/cbor) cuts ~30%.
payload_limits_on_wire.ws_server_memory_per_conn: ~3 KB with ws; ~15 KB with socket.io (literature)

channel_primitive: You implement it. Room concept = in-memory Map<channelKey, Set<WebSocket>>. Maps cleanly to src/lib/realtime.ts keys (board:{id}, board:{id}:section:{id}).
maintenance_signal: Active — ws 8.x; socket.io 4.8 (2026 edition guides published).
